title: The Official Star Wars Fact File 62
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 62}} {{ReferenceMagazine |image=[[File:Fact_file_62.jpg]] |title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 62 |editor=[[Christopher Cerasi]] |contributors=*[[Andrew Darling]] *[[James McFadden]] *[[Rich Handley]] *[[Matthew Harvey]] *[[Liz Holliday]] *[[Iain Lowson]] *[[Jim Swallow]] |publisher=[[De Agostini]] |release date=[[March 5]], [[2003]]{{FFdates|62}} |intl release= |pages= |issue=62 |featured= |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' }} '''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 62''' was the sixty-second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 5]], [[2003]]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== *The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] Attack
How the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] repelled the attack on [[Theed/Legends|Theed City]] *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Senator Padmé Amidala]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
How Han's relationship with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] flourished after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] *[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] - [[Clone military education complex|Clone Center]] *[[R4-P17/Legends|R4-P17 (ARFOUR)]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong]] Weapons *[[IPG-X1131 LongTail|Teemto Pagalies' Podracer]] ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Official Star Wars Fact File 62}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{FactFileNav|61|63}} {{Interlang |fi=The Official Star Wars Fact File 62 |ka=The Official Star Wars Fact File 62 }} [[Category:The Official Star Wars Fact File (2002) issues|62]]
